name: Authentication Gateway
description: Single-route authentication entry for products that consolidate sign-in, registration, and recovery into one adaptable gateway screen.

page_briefs.login: Single centered authentication card that can switch between sign-in, registration, and recovery modes without leaving the route. Support OAuth providers, clear state transitions, and concise recovery/help affordances inside one focused gateway surface.

shells.centered: Centered gateway card on a minimal background for focused authentication entry.
